subject: Public Health
title: Vitamins and Deficiency Diseases
description: A quick win: understand Vitamins and Deficiency Diseases.

hook.text: Sailors on long voyages lost their teeth and bled from their gums. The cure was just a lemon.

buildup.text: Scurvy is caused by vitamin C deficiency. It killed more sailors than battles or storms.

discovery.text: Each vitamin deficiency has its own disease—rickets from D, beriberi from B1, pellagra from B3.

twist.text: Vitamin deficiencies still affect 2 billion people—mainly in countries where diets lack variety.

climax.text: Fortifying staple foods with vitamins has become one of the cheapest public health interventions.

punchline.text: A few milligrams of vitamins prevent ancient diseases.
